sentences.translation: Muhammed je pročitao: «Strpljenjem i opreznošću postiže se ono čemu se teži».
sentences.translationEn: Muhammad read: «With patience and care, wishes are achieved».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ الصَّبْرَ وَالتَّرَوِّيَ يُوصِلَانِ إِلَى الأَهْدَافِ.
sentences.translation: To znači da strpljenje i opreznost vode do ciljeva.
sentences.translationEn: This means that patience and carefulness lead to goals.

sentences.arabic: أَرَادَ مُحَمَّدٌ شِرَاءَ دَرَّاجَةٍ جَدِيدَةٍ فَادَّخَرَ مَصْرُوفَهُ.
sentences.translation: Muhammed je htio kupiti novi bicikl pa je štedio džeparac.
sentences.translationEn: Muhammad wanted to buy a new bicycle so he saved his pocket money.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ شَهْرَيْنِ اشْتَرَى الدَّرَّاجَةَ وَكَانَ سَعِيدًا.
sentences.translation: Nakon dva mjeseca kupio je bicikl i bio je sretan.
sentences.translationEn: After two months he bought the bicycle and was happy.
